dbpr_notices_abt_90d.scope_note: Hard-parsed DBPR public notices with ABT or hospitality industry in SWFL. Rising = bearish (compliance stress signal).

dbpr_releases_abt_90d.prefLabel: ABT/Hospitality Enforcement Activity, Press Releases (Last 90 Days)
dbpr_releases_abt_90d.scope_note: SWFL-relevant DBPR press releases with ABT/hospitality in affected_industries or topics, Sonnet-inferred. Softer signal than dbpr_notices_abt_90d.

dbpr_notices_lee_90d.scope_note: Active DBPR public notices for Lee County in last 90 days. Hard-parsed county field. Data-only; no direction contribution.

dbpr_notices_collier_90d.scope_note: Active DBPR public notices for Collier County in last 90 days. Hard-parsed county field. Data-only; no direction contribution.

median_dom_yoy_days.prefLabel: Median Days on Market YoY Change
altLabels: median days on market year-over-year change in days

laus_lee_unemployment_rate_initial_vinta.prefLabel: Lee County Unemployment Rate — Initial BLS Vintage
laus_lee_unemployment_rate_initial_vinta.scope_note: First-issued BLS LAUS vintage of Lee County unemployment rate for a given observation_date (realtime_start == observation date). This is the number publicly available at decision time, before subsequent BLS revisions. Source: ALFRED FRED API series FLLEEC7URN, Tier-1 Parquet lake-tier1/macro/fred_laus_alfred. Required for Track-B backward-engine retrodiction and flywheel backtesting.

laus_collier_unemployment_rate_initial_v.prefLabel: Collier County Unemployment Rate — Initial BLS Vintage
laus_collier_unemployment_rate_initial_v.scope_note: First-issued BLS LAUS vintage of Collier County unemployment rate for a given observation_date. Parallel to laus_lee_unemployment_rate_initial_vintage. Source: ALFRED FRED API series FLCOLL0URN, Tier-1 Parquet lake-tier1/macro/fred_laus_alfred.

laus_lee_unemployment_rate_revision_delt.prefLabel: Lee County LAUS Unemployment Rate BLS Revision Delta
laus_lee_unemployment_rate_revision_delt.scope_note: Difference between the latest BLS vintage and the initial-vintage reading for Lee County unemployment (latest - initial, pp). Non-zero = BLS revised after first release. Positive = revised upward (worse). Used in flywheel scoring to flag whether a past decision was based on data that subsequently shifted direction. Source: ALFRED Tier-1 Parquet FLLEEC7URN.

laus_collier_unemployment_rate_revision_.prefLabel: Collier County LAUS Unemployment Rate BLS Revision Delta
laus_collier_unemployment_rate_revision_.scope_note: Difference between latest and initial BLS vintage for Collier County unemployment rate (pp). Parallel to laus_lee_unemployment_rate_revision_delta. Source: ALFRED Tier-1 Parquet FLCOLL0URN.

laus_lee_unemployment_vintage_count.prefLabel: Lee County LAUS Unemployment — BLS Vintage Count
laus_lee_unemployment_vintage_count.scope_note: Number of distinct BLS-issued vintages (realtime windows) for a given Lee County observation_date. One vintage = one BLS issuance, possibly revised from prior. Higher count = number has been scrutinized and revised more times. Data-maturity signal for flywheel decision scoring. Source: ALFRED Tier-1 Parquet FLLEEC7URN.

laus_collier_unemployment_vintage_count.prefLabel: Collier County LAUS Unemployment — BLS Vintage Count
laus_collier_unemployment_vintage_count.scope_note: Number of distinct BLS-issued vintages for a given Collier County observation_date. Parallel to laus_lee_unemployment_vintage_count. Source: ALFRED Tier-1 Parquet FLCOLL0URN.

safety_property_crime_per_1k_lee.scope_note: Lee County property crime offenses per 1,000 residents, FBI Crime Data Explorer NIBRS, coverage-matched to reporting agencies. Annual; a falling rate is bullish for the investment environment.

safety_property_crime_per_1k_collier.scope_note: Collier County property crime offenses per 1,000 residents, FBI Crime Data Explorer NIBRS (Sheriff + Marco Island footprint; Naples PD does not report). Annual.

safety_property_crime_per_1k_swfl.scope_note: Population-weighted Lee + Collier property crime offenses per 1,000 residents, FBI Crime Data Explorer NIBRS. Annual; a falling rate is bullish.

safety_property_crime_yoy_pct_swfl.scope_note: Year-over-year percent change in the SWFL population-weighted property crime rate. Negative is bullish (falling crime).

safety_property_crime_yoy_pct_lee.prefLabel: Lee County Property Crime Rate YoY
safety_property_crime_yoy_pct_lee.scope_note: Year-over-year percent change in the Lee County property crime rate. Suppressed to neutral when the NIBRS reporting footprint shifts >10%.

safety_property_crime_yoy_pct_collier.prefLabel: Collier County Property Crime Rate YoY
safety_property_crime_yoy_pct_collier.scope_note: Year-over-year percent change in the Collier County property crime rate. Suppressed to neutral when the NIBRS reporting footprint shifts >10%.

safety_total_property_crimes_lee.prefLabel: Lee County Total Property Crime Incidents
safety_total_property_crimes_lee.scope_note: Total property crime incidents reported in Lee County, FBI Crime Data Explorer NIBRS, latest year. Raw count behind the per-1k rate.

safety_total_property_crimes_collier.prefLabel: Collier County Total Property Crime Incidents
safety_total_property_crimes_collier.scope_note: Total property crime incidents reported in Collier County, FBI Crime Data Explorer NIBRS, latest year. Raw count behind the per-1k rate.

econ_dev_announcements_90d.scope_note: Count of qualifying economic-development announcements (relocation, expansion, grant, infrastructure) in the trailing 90 days from SWFL Inc. (swflinc.com/blog/), the Lee County EDO. Momentum numerator paired with econ_dev_announcements_prior_90d.

econ_dev_announcements_prior_90d.scope_note: Count of qualifying SWFL Inc. economic-development announcements in the 90-180-day prior window. Momentum baseline for econ_dev_announcements_90d (direction = rising/falling versus this window).

econ_dev_investment_usd_90d.scope_note: Sum of disclosed capital investment across SWFL Inc. announcements in the trailing 90 days. Conditionally emitted only when at least one announcement discloses an investment figure; values reflect announcement-time intent, not audited outcomes.

econ_dev_jobs_90d.scope_note: Sum of disclosed jobs announced across SWFL Inc. announcements in the trailing 90 days. Conditionally emitted only when at least one announcement discloses a jobs figure; values reflect announcement-time intent, not audited hiring.

commercial_permits_count.scope_note: Count of issued commercial building permits across SWFL for the reporting calendar year, from the Maxwell, Hendry & Simmons annual Data Book (data_lake.mhs_permits_swfl, source_name='mhs_databook'). SWFL-wide total across all mapped submarkets. Distinct from residential Accela permits (permits-swfl) — never blend the two. Single-year snapshot; not a trend until a second annual book lands.

commercial_permits_value_usd.scope_note: Sum of declared permit value (USD) across SWFL issued commercial building permits for the reporting calendar year, from the MHS Data Book (data_lake.mhs_permits_swfl). Declared value is the applicant-stated construction value, not appraised or assessed value. SWFL-wide total across all mapped submarkets; distinct from residential Accela permits.

commercial_permits_sf.scope_note: Sum of building square footage across SWFL issued commercial building permits for the reporting calendar year, from the MHS Data Book (data_lake.mhs_permits_swfl). SWFL-wide total across all mapped submarkets; rows with a missing building_sf contribute 0. Distinct from residential Accela permits.

seller_stress_score_swfl.scope_note: Composite seller stress score (0-100) per SWFL region, computed as a z-score-weighted combination of delistings rate, price drop breadth, cancellation rate, avg drop depth, and relisting rate vs the 2019-2021 baseline. Higher = more stress = more bearish.

market_heat_tilt_swfl.scope_note: SWFL market-heat tilt (0-100, 50 = balanced; >50 = tightening/seller-favoring) — median per-ZIP composite of the inventory, DOM, and pending-ratio year-over-year signals from realtor.com. Higher = more tightening = more bullish. Distinct from Hotness, which is a relative cross-sectional rank, not this directional tilt.

market_heat_inventory_yy_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median active-listing count, year-over-year change (realtor.com, ZIP grain). The lead tightening signal — falling inventory = bullish.

altLabels: days on market year over year
market_heat_dom_yy_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median days-on-market, year-over-year change (realtor.com, ZIP grain). Falling = homes selling faster = bullish.

market_heat_pending_ratio_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median pending ratio (pending ÷ active listings; realtor.com, ZIP grain). The leading demand edge — rising = demand tightening = bullish.

market_heat_price_cut_share_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median share of active listings with a price reduction (realtor.com, ZIP grain). Coincident context — rising = softening. Realtor's list-side cut share is distinct from the Redfin price-drop breadth that feeds seller-stress-swfl.

seller_stress_delistings_rate_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median share of active listings that were delisted (taken off market without selling) in the rolling 3-month period. Leading indicator — delistings lead price unlock per Redfin Nov 2025 research. Higher = more bearish.

seller_stress_price_drops_rate_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median share of active listings that received at least one price reduction in the rolling 3-month period. Coincident seller-side signal per Zillow Market Heat Index methodology (2024). Higher = more bearish.

seller_stress_cancellation_rate_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median contract cancellation rate (cancellations as % of pending sales) in the rolling 3-month period. Lagging indicator (~30-60 days). Not included in any public composite seller stress score at ZIP grain. Higher = more bearish.

seller_stress_avg_drop_depth_swfl.prefLabel: SWFL Median Avg Price Drop Depth
seller_stress_avg_drop_depth_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median average size of price reductions among listings that received a cut in the rolling 3-month period. Lagging indicator per Dallas Fed nowcast (2023): depth amplifies breadth signal but lags it. Higher = more bearish.

freshness_mortgage_30yr_fixed_pct.prefLabel: 30-Year Fixed Mortgage Rate — Today's Sourced Value
freshness_mortgage_30yr_fixed_pct.scope_note: Today's 30-year fixed mortgage rate (US average) from the daily freshness layer in api mode — a deterministic pull from FRED MORTGAGE30US (Freddie Mac PMMS, weekly Thursday release, units Percent). Area 'swfl' carries the single national rate; FRED is its own authority (no separate vendor anchor).

cre_active_listings_estero_asking_rent_p.prefLabel: Estero Active Listing Median Asking Rent PSF (Crexi)
cre_active_listings_estero_asking_rent_p.scope_note: Median asking rent per sqft from Crexi available commercial listings in Estero, FL. No broker aggregate survey covers this submarket. Available-listings only; does not represent total submarket inventory.

cre_active_listings_estero_available_sqf.prefLabel: Estero Total Available Sqft on Crexi
cre_active_listings_estero_available_sqf.scope_note: Total sqft of available commercial listings on Crexi in Estero, FL. Sum of sqft across active listings only — not a vacancy rate (no total inventory denominator).

cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ask.prefLabel: Fort Myers Beach Active Listing Median Asking Rent PSF (Crexi)
altLabels: Fort Myers Beach asking rent listings
cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ask.scope_note: Median asking rent per sqft from Crexi available commercial listings in Fort Myers Beach, FL. No broker aggregate survey covers this submarket. Available-listings only.

cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ava.prefLabel: Fort Myers Beach Total Available Sqft on Crexi
cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ava.scope_note: Total sqft of available commercial listings on Crexi in Fort Myers Beach, FL. Sum of sqft across active listings only — not a vacancy rate.

entry_level_listing_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings priced under $300,000 (Lee + Collier), from the realtor.com price-histogram aggregate. Includes vacant land/lots — not all entry-level homes. List-side snapshot.

midmarket_listing_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings priced $300,000 to $600,000 (Lee + Collier), from the realtor.com price-histogram aggregate. List-side snapshot.

upper_tier_listing_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings priced $600,000 to $1,000,000 (Lee + Collier), from the realtor.com price-histogram aggregate. List-side snapshot.

luxury_listing_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings priced $1,000,000 and above (Lee + Collier), from the realtor.com price-histogram aggregate. List-side snapshot.

altLabels: share of listings with a price cut
price_reduced_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings currently carrying a price reduction (Lee + Collier), a point-in-time flag share off our own realtor.com for-sale sweep. A leading softening signal; a rising share week-over-week reads as market cooling. Distinct from market-heat's monthly YoY price-cut metric.

new_listing_share_swfl.scope_note: Share of active SWFL for-sale listings flagged newly listed (Lee + Collier), a point-in-time flag share off our own realtor.com for-sale sweep. A leading supply signal; a rising share week-over-week reads as fresh inventory building.

sold_to_rent_ratio_swfl.scope_note: SWFL median price-to-annual-rent multiple (median home sold price ÷ annual rent), from realtor.com's monthly ZIP aggregates (Lee + Collier). Its inverse is the implied GROSS rental yield (before taxes/insurance/HOA/vacancy). The one field no free source publishes — this brain's net-new read, distinct from the sold price and rent index tracked elsewhere.

cre_corridor_evolution_stages.prefLabel: Corridor Evolution Stage â€” Ordered by Operator Friendliness

member_notes.growing: Falling cap rate and/or vacancy, active development flags. Best landlord position.
member_notes.stable: Cap rate and vacancy flat. Healthy equilibrium; limited upside.
member_notes.repositioning: Tenant mix or use changing. Cap rate / vacancy may diverge. Watch flags closely.
member_notes.declining: Rising cap rate and/or vacancy, outmigration signals. Tenant-market territory.

cre_active_listings_estero_asking_rent_p.prefLabel: Estero Active Listing Median Asking Rent PSF (Crexi)
cre_active_listings_estero_asking_rent_p.scope_note: Median asking rent per sqft from Crexi available commercial listings in Estero, FL. No broker aggregate survey covers this submarket. Available-listings only; does not represent total submarket inventory.

cre_active_listings_estero_available_sqf.prefLabel: Estero Total Available Sqft on Crexi
cre_active_listings_estero_available_sqf.scope_note: Total sqft of available commercial listings on Crexi in Estero, FL. Sum of sqft across active listings only — not a vacancy rate (no total inventory denominator).

altLabels: Fort Myers Beach asking rent listings
cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ask.scope_note: Median asking rent per sqft from Crexi available commercial listings in Fort Myers Beach, FL. No broker aggregate survey covers this submarket. Available-listings only.

cre_active_listings_fort_myers_beach_ava.scope_note: Total sqft of available commercial listings on Crexi in Fort Myers Beach, FL. Sum of sqft across active listings only — not a vacancy rate.

sba_franchise_survival_table.scope_note: detail_table id 'franchise_survival' emitted by the franchise-outcomes pack. One row per SBA franchise brand in Lee & Collier counties. Columns: survival_rate (0–1 ratio over resolved loans; null = not yet assessable), n_paid_in_full, n_charged_off, n_loans (total incl. active), total_gross_approval (USD). Not a key_metrics slug — registered here for documentation only; check-vocab-coverage does not scan detail_table ids.

cre_corridor_seasonality_table.scope_note: detail_table id 'corridor_seasonality' emitted by the cre-swfl pack. One row per verified SWFL CRE corridor that has a non-null seasonal_index. Columns: seasonal_index (ratio 0–1; 0 = no seasonality, 1 = extreme seasonality). Row key = raw corridor name; label = displayNameFor() display name. Not a key_metrics slug — registered here for documentation only; check-vocab-coverage does not scan detail_table ids. PROVENANCE (verified 2026-06-12): corridor_profiles.seasonal_index is populated only by curator/editorial process (Supabase Studio direct edits). corridor_profiles has zero cadence_registry entries — no ingest pipeline, dlt run, PDF import, or ODD feed targets this column today. corridor_grounded reads corridor_profiles (to enumerate verified corridors) but writes only to lake-tier1 NDJSON, not back to corridor_profiles. TRIPWIRE: if any feed later populates seasonal_index automatically, the null semantics invert from 'not yet editorially assigned' to 'window not filled yet'. At that point: (1) the SeasonalRadialChart empty-state copy ('No seasonality data available.') must be revisited; (2) the non-null filter in bindSeasonalRadial and creSwflOutputProducer must be re-evaluated for cadence-window semantics; (3) the row-vs-brain classification may need an ODD scaffold review. Flag this before activating any such feed.

freshness_median_sale_price_cape_coral_u.prefLabel: Cape Coral — Today's Sourced Median Sale Price
altLabels: Cape Coral current median sale price
Cape Coral daily freshness median price
freshness_median_sale_price_cape_coral_u.scope_note: Today's cited median residential sale price for Cape Coral, FL from the daily freshness layer (data_lake.daily_truth, fetch_mode=search). One grounded source's current figure, provenance-gated to a real source URL (never a model-memory number) and screened against our own prior value for anomalies. Surfaces between the slower monthly Redfin/ZHVI vendor refreshes; the vendor re-anchors the baseline on its native cadence (plan file 05).

freshness_median_sale_price_fort_myers_u.prefLabel: Fort Myers — Today's Sourced Median Sale Price
altLabels: Fort Myers current median sale price
Fort Myers daily freshness median price
freshness_median_sale_price_fort_myers_u.scope_note: Today's cited median residential sale price for Fort Myers, FL from the daily freshness layer (data_lake.daily_truth, fetch_mode=search). One grounded source's current figure, provenance-gated to a real source URL and anomaly-screened against our own prior value. Bridges the gap between the slower monthly vendor refreshes.

freshness_median_sale_price_naples_usd.prefLabel: Naples — Today's Sourced Median Sale Price
freshness_median_sale_price_naples_usd.scope_note: Today's cited median residential sale price for Naples, FL (Collier) from the daily freshness layer (data_lake.daily_truth, fetch_mode=search). One grounded source's current figure, provenance-gated to a real source URL and anomaly-screened against our own prior value. Bridges the gap between the slower monthly vendor refreshes.

freshness_zip_pulse_median_price_approx.scope_note: Per-ZIP pulse median price PROJECTION from the freshness-pulse Baseline-Delta machine — today's county-grain fresh delta applied to that ZIP's vendor baseline (ZHVI/Redfin). source_tag='approx', an [INFERENCE] (never a cited ZIP fact), superseded by the next ZIP-grain vendor file; a same-period vendor value wins. Today these ride in the freshness_by_zip detail_table (cells, not key_metrics — check-vocab-coverage does not scan detail_table ids); the pattern is registered now so a future key_metrics emission never orphans. Mirrors env-swfl's swfl_zip_*_flood_aal_usd_per_insured_property per-ZIP pattern.
